name: VellorMessenger
description: A premium, dark-themed messenger with glassmorphism aesthetics and cinematic animations.

items: admin panel now secured with encrypted PIN (SHA256)
all admin actions logged to database with timestamps
admin access restricted to username 'arfstudoo' only
backend verification for admin PIN instead of client-side
default PIN is 2077 (change after setup)
fixed duplicate key error on device insertion (now using UPSERT)
optimized device tracking - only updates necessary devices
fixed infinite login/logout loop (delayed first check to 15s)
removed redundant broadcast subscriptions
simplified device realtime subscriptions
drafts - auto-save unsent messages when switching chats
draft indicator in chat list (orange color)
drafts stored in localStorage with auto-cleanup
mentions - type @ to mention group members
mention suggestions with fuzzy search
mentions highlighted in blue with background
search in chat - find messages by text
search navigation (next/prev results)
auto-scroll to found messages with highlight
forward messages to other chats
forwarded messages show 'Переслано от [name]'
forward modal with all available chats
message colors changed from red to dark blue theme
brighter read receipts (blue #60a5fa)
improved input field design (52px height, better borders)
send button with 3-color gradient and hover effect
larger icons (22-23px) and rounder corners (1.6rem)
fixed scroll - now scrolls to bottom completely
pinned badge now blue instead of red
reactions with blue accent colors
added shadow-glow-blue effect
added admin_pins table for secure PIN storage
added admin_logs table for action tracking
added forwarded_from and forwarded_from_name to messages
added indexes for better query performance
created verify_admin_pin() function
created set_admin_pin() function
created log_admin_action() function
optimized realtime updates with batching (50ms debounce)
reduced unnecessary re-renders in MessageItem
improved scroll performance with throttling
lazy loading for images
draft auto-save with 500ms debounce
